revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>data-sort-value="{{{sort|Yes}}}" style="background: #DFD; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-yes2 skin-invert" {{#if:{{{rowspan|}}}|rowspan="{{{rowspan}}}"}} |{{{text|[[File:Check-green.svg|13px|link={{{link|}}}|{{{1|Yes}}}]]}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
[[Category:Checkmark insertion templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Checkmark insertion templates

</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>data-sort-value="{{{sort|Yes}}}" style="background: #DFD; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-yes2 skin-invert" {{#if:{{{rowspan|}}}|rowspan="{{{rowspan}}}"}} |{{{text|[[File:Check-green.svg|13px|link={{{link|}}}|{{{1|Yes}}}]]}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>data-sort-value="{{{sort|Yes}}}" style="background: #DFD; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-yes2 skin-invert" {{#if:{{{rowspan|}}}|rowspan="{{{rowspan}}}"}} |{{{text|[[File:Check-green.svg|13px|link={{{link|}}}|{{{1|Yes}}}]]}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
